iot.mitigationaction.ActionName.Docs: The friendly name of the mitigation action.

iot.mitigationaction.ActionParams.Docs: The set of parameters for this mitigation action. The parameters vary, depending on the kind of action you apply.

iot.mitigationaction.RoleArn.Docs: The IAM role ARN used to apply this mitigation action.

iot.mitigationaction.Tags.Docs: Metadata that can be used to manage the mitigation action.
